description: Style Note This forever classic and trendy purple bag from murcia is a closet essential. Perfect for colour blocking and mix-and-match ensembles, make this piece your go-to essential to add a fresh twist to off-duty staples. Product Details Leatherette upper with contrast stitch detailing for durability One main zipped compartment with two zipped pockets and an insert pocket Two short handles for carrying ease Stud and zip detail on the front and back for style Zipped pocket on the back Branding on the front Material and Care Leatherette Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust Size Height: 26 cm Width: 35 cm Depth: 11 cm
